pageContext.name: Obtainer of Rare Antiquities
pageContext.description: '...So forget any ideas you've got about lost cities, exotic travel, and digging up the world. We do not follow maps to buried treasure, and 'X' never, ever marks the spot.'  Sideshow and ACME Archives are pleased to present the Obtainer of Rare Antiquities Fine Art Lithograph by Eric Elia!  This Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade-inspired print comes hand-numbered and with a certificate of authenticity.   Indy fans and Fine Art collectors, be sure to add the Obtainer of Rare Antiquities print to your Indiana Jones gallery today!
